leadText: This article is about the location in the Battle Zone. For the Pokéwalker Route, see Resort (Pokéwalker). The Resort Area (Japanese: リゾートエリア Resort Area) is a small, town-like area in the Battle Zone, northeast of Sinnoh. Notably, there is no Poké Mart here.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] The Resort Area is the location of both the highest- and lowest-leveled wild Pokémon in any core series game : Magikarp . The level 1 Magikarp are tied with the Snowpoint Temple 's Regigigas in Platinum and the Nature Preserve 's level 1 Magikarp and Gyarados in Black 2 and White 2 . The level 100 Magikarp are tied with the Nature Preserve's level 100 Magikarp and Gyarados in Black 2 and White 2 and the Fellhorn Gorge 's level 100 Magikarp in Scarlet and Violet . Sharing identical music with Valor Lakefront , this is the only settlement of the Battle Zone that shares music with mainland Sinnoh . Since both the Fight Area and Survival Area share the same music, this could be a stylistic choice on the developers behalf to distinguish the Resort Area as less battle-focused, and more on leisure and Pokémon rest and care. Name origin [ edit | edit source ] The name may refer to the fact that this area is very peaceful, as well as the fact that the Ribbon Syndicate, into which only very skilled Coordinators can enter, is located here.
